description: Beyond the Veil Patch 4 (13 February 2023) — Traditional Chinese and Indonesian Added, Season 17 Statue Unveiled, Changes and Improvements, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Traditional Chinese and Indonesian Added

subsections.heading: Traditional Chinese and Indonesian

items.text: These languages are selectable from within the launcher or via the in-game Settings menu
Dedicated chat channels have been added to the game for these languages
Forthcoming news articles will appear in these languages as well
Dedicated forums have been added
To report translation issues for these or other supported languages, please use this dedicated thread: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/87904

Note to Steam users: As Steam does not support Indonesian localization, the store page and Achievements will remain in English. Localized Achievement names for all languages can be viewed directly in the game client.

Localized Achievement names for all languages can be viewed directly in the game client.

sections.heading: Season 17 Statue Unveiled
sections.searchable_text: Season 17 Statue Unveiled Take-off-Wuhu Dancing on the Grave EQMS EQMS

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements

items.text: Guild and Alliance formation costs updated
Added "Always" option for Streamer Mode popup, and Steam login is now hidden like other credentials
Reworked, improved, and diversified ambient sounds for all biomes and cities
Added 2 slots to trading UI; updated layout
Artifact item details now show which items they can make; items can be clicked for more info
Added Search / Filter options to Bank and Chest UI
Price display is now consistent across building types (crafting stations, Vanity Merchant, etc.)
Added message when crafting stations are not usable due to lacking access or nutrition
Shared Loadouts UI now opens inventory tab if no equipment is set
Fast Travel journey selection now has subcategories and is searchable
Adjusted standard Silver price ranges for City Plots bought directly from the system
New appearance options added to character customization

subitems.text: Additional skin color palette with 7 olive tones
2 new male and 3 new female hairstyles
1 new face option each for male and female characters
2 new character Avatars each for male and female characters

items.text: Added tutorial screen to Black Market and Marketplace screens to give additional information on what they are and how they work
Added tutorial screen to the Wardrobe and Mount Skin section of the Appearance screen to give additional information about how to equip skins and how unlocks work
Heretic Mob Changes

subitems.text: Changed Tank Miniboss dash to be in a line and target into a direction instead of on top of the targeted enemy, also uninterruptible

sections.searchable_text: Changes and Improvements Guild and Alliance formation costs updated Guild: 100,000 → 1,000,000 Silver Alliance: 500,000 → 5,000,000 Silver Added "Always" option for Streamer Mode popup, and Steam login is now hidden like other credentials Reworked, improved, and diversified ambient sounds for all biomes and cities Added 2 slots to trading UI; updated layout Artifact item details now show which items they can make; items can be clicked for more info Added Search / Filter options to Bank and Chest UI Price display is now consistent across building types (crafting stations, Vanity Merchant, etc.) Added message when crafting stations are not usable due to lacking access or nutrition Shared Loadouts UI now opens inventory tab if no equipment is set Fast Travel journey selection now has subcategories and is searchable Adjusted standard Silver price ranges for City Plots bought directly from the system Rests (Outlands Towns): 5,000,000 - 15,000,000 Caerleon / Brecilien: 5,000,000 - 45,000,000 Royal Cities: 5,000,000 - 200,000,000 New appearance options added to character customization Additional skin color palette with 7 olive tones 2 new male and 3 new female hairstyles 1 new face option each for male and female characters 2 new character Avatars each for male and female characters Added tutorial screen to Black Market and Marketplace screens to give additional information on what they are and how they work Added tutorial screen to the Wardrobe and Mount Skin section of the Appearance screen to give additional information about how to equip skins and how unlocks work Heretic Mob Changes Added or adjusted abilities for Changed Tank Miniboss dash to be in a line and target into a direction instead of on top of the targeted enemy, also uninterruptible

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

items.text: Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff)

subitems.text: Base Cooldown: 60s → 45s (Cooldown scaling stays the same, so it has 25s cooldown on 2000 IP)
Player Immunity after a Player Freeze: 15s → 5s

stats.name: Player Immunity after a Player Freeze

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff) Can no longer freeze allies Base Cooldown: 60s → 45s (Cooldown scaling stays the same, so it has 25s cooldown on 2000 IP) Cast Time: 0.6s → 0s Hit Delay: 0s → 0.5s Enemy Player Freeze Duration: 2s → 3s Player Immunity after a Player Freeze: 15s → 5s

subsections.heading: Bows

items.text: Auto-Attacks
Poisoned Arrow (all Bows)
Ray of Light (all Bows)
Spell Unlock Order

subitems.text: Level 70: Ray of Light → Explosive Arrows

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Auto-Attacks Standtime after each attack: 0.4s → 0.3s Poisoned Arrow (all Bows) Hit Delay: 0.2s → 0.1s Ray of Light (all Bows) Cooldown: 12s → 10s Root Duration: 1.99s → 1.8s Spell Unlock Order Level 70: Ray of Light → Explosive Arrows

subsections.heading: Crossbows

items.text: Auto-Attacks

subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Auto-Attacks Standtime after each attack: 0.4s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Staffs

items.text: Anguished Soul (Demonic Staff)

subitems.text: Now consumes all Vile Curse Charges on the target

subsections.searchable_text: Staffs Anguished Soul (Demonic Staff) Now consumes all Vile Curse Charges on the target

subsections.heading: Hammers

items.text: Giant Steps (Forge Hammers)

subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Giant Steps (Forge Hammers) Armor Factor: 0.35 → 0.2 Magic Resistance Factor: 0.59 → 0.35

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

items.text: Concussive Combo (formerly Concussive Blow; all Quarterstaffs)

subitems.text: Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s
Land a Flowing Blow on the targeted enemy, dealing physical damage in a cone in front of you.
Land an overhead Concussive Blow on the target, dealing physical damage and stuns.

items.text: Vault Leap (regular Quarterstaff)

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Concussive Combo (formerly Concussive Blow; all Quarterstaffs) Reworked into a multicast ability Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s 1st and 2nd: Flowing Blow 3rd Concussive Blow Vault Leap (regular Quarterstaff) Standtime: 0.6s → 0.25s Range 15m → 12m

subsections.heading: Swords

items.text: Added new W-ability: Blade Cyclone

subitems.text: Swirl into target direction, dealing 40 physical damage up to 3 times.
If you have at least 1 Heroic Charge active, it will be consumed and enemies take 60 physical damage every hit instead.

items.text: Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade)
Adjusted Spell Unlock Order

subsections.searchable_text: Swords Added new W-ability: Blade Cyclone Swirl into target direction, dealing 40 physical damage up to 3 times. Move Speed: 11m/s Range: 7m Standtime: 0.25s If you have at least 1 Heroic Charge active, it will be consumed and enemies take 60 physical damage every hit instead. Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade) Projectile Speed: 28m/s → 29.3m/s Improved Projectile Hit Detection Adjusted Spell Unlock Order Always Unlocked Level 3: Interrupt Level 15: Splitting Slash Level 40: Hamstring Level 70: Parry Strike Level 85: Iron Will

subsections.heading: Shoes

items.text: Ethereal Form (Feyscale Sandals)

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Ethereal Form (Feyscale Sandals) The channel is now uninterruptible Removed the self damage reduction

items.text: Bows
Crossbows
Quarterstaffs
Maces
Swords
Armors

subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous: Visual Overhauls Bows Auto Attacks Poisoned Arrow (all Bows) Enchanted Quiver (Regular Bow) Undead Arrows (Whispering Bow) Crossbows Auto Attacks (including Energy Shaper) Quarterstaffs Concussive Blow (all Quarterstaffs) Maces Sacred Ground (all Maces) Swords Splitting Slash (all Swords) Mighty Blow (Broadsword) Charge (Claymore) Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade) Armors Speed Caster (Scholar Robe)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: UI fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where, on opening Travel Planner from an island, some destinations would be missing or not highlighted
Fixed issue where notifications counter stated wrong numbers in main UI
Fixed issue where cooldown times in spell slots would not display correctly when items with Cooldown Reduction were equipped
Fixed issue where sorting and filtering in the Marketplace UI did not function correctly
Fixed issue where Dynamic Actions and Minimum Gathering Tier settings couldn't be changed on desktop
Fixed sorting issues in Warriors Forge and Mage Tower, as well as with Fey Armor and Offhands
Fixed issue where guilds with over 300 active members would not appear in the guild finder
Fixed issue where Loadouts sent by mail were not clickable
Fixed issue where "Skip Cluster" from character selection screen gave an error message
Fixed issue where dropdown in Crystal League Season UI would disappear
Fixed issue where "My Party" section in Party Finder was blank after reopening it
Fixed issue where guild creation cost was different on UI and confirmation popup
Fixed issue where Loadouts would not save after multiple edits
Fixed issue where construction confirmation window would not close with ESC key
Fixed issue where Hideout Headquarters UI incorrectly said qualifications were not met for Roads of Avalon
Equipment now updates in real time for applicants requesting to join in Party Finder
Fixed issue where enchanted resource message displayed wrong rarity
Fixed issue where disabling Open World Tooltips for Mists entrances also disabled tooltips for region exits
Fixed issue where opening Destiny Board while a tooltip was displayed could cause tooltip to persist
Fixed issue where a shared Loadout would not display the selected passive and active spells when items were clicked

items.text: Controller fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where "Select Loadout" dropdown in "Loadouts" Marketplace tab was not selectable
Fixed issue where checkboxes in "Open-World Tooltips" settings were inactive
Fixed issue where zone map border covered gamepad controls display
Fixed issue that caused abilities to activate after closing inventory if button was pressed before opening
Improved casting of position / rotation spells with "cast on release" mode
Fixed issues where spell indicator areas would not appear and inventory UI would close after returning focus to game

items.text: Mobile fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where spell cast indicators would persist after being silenced during casting
Fixed issue where traps in Corrupted Dungeons could be selected while targeting
Fixed issue where manual target drags would not lock the dynamic action attack mode

items.text: Ability fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where Cripple (Spears) could purge Heroic Stacks even while target was immune to purges
Fixed issue where Falcon Smash (War Gloves) could lead to players being briefly stuck
Fixed issue where Electric Field (Stalker Jacket) and Lifesteal visuals would persist after mounting

items.text: Fixed issue where chest rarity could be viewed before unlocking
Fixed issue where laborers could return with no resources
Fixed issue where mobs in Roads of Avalon camps could respawn without a chest present
Fixed issue where characters would freeze when casting spell and opening loot bag at the same time
Fixed issue where Fearless Rush (Elite Wild Boar) didn't give immunity to forced movement effects
"Autumn Tree" furniture item now appears in correct fall colors
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
